response:
# Java Session Plan: P.P.S.
## (Practical · Progressive · Structured)

---

## 🎯 Overview

| Element | Details |
|---|---|
| **Language** | Java |
| **Approach** | Practical → Progressive → Structured |
| **Target** | Beginner to Intermediate |
| **Format** | Theory + Code + Practice |

---

## 📌 Phase 1 — PRACTICAL
> *"Learn by doing first"*

### Session 1 — Hello, Java!
- Install JDK & IDE (IntelliJ / VS Code)
- Write & run first program
- Understand `main()` method
- **Mini Task:** Print your name & age

### Session 2 — Variables & Data Types
- `int`, `double`, `String`, `boolean`, `char`
- Variable declaration & initialization
- **Mini Task:** Build a simple bio card

### Session 3 — Input & Output
- `Scanner` class
- `System.out.println()`
- **Mini Task:** Take user input & display formatted output

---

## 📌 Phase 2 — PROGRESSIVE
> *"Build complexity step by step"*

### Session 4 — Operators & Expressions
- Arithmetic, Relational, Logical
- Ternary operator
- **Mini Task:** Simple calculator

### Session 5 — Control Flow
- `if / else if / else`
- `switch` statement
- **Mini Task:** Grade checker program

### Session 6 — Loops
- `for`, `while`, `do-while`
- `break` & `continue`
- **Mini Task:** Multiplication table generator

### Session 7 — Arrays
- 1D & 2D arrays
- Array traversal
- **Mini Task:** Find max/min in an array

### Session 8 — Methods / Functions
- Method declaration & calling
- Parameters & return types
- Method overloading
- **Mini Task:** Reusable math utility methods

---

## 📌 Phase 3 — STRUCTURED
> *"Think like a software engineer"*

### Session 9 — OOP Basics
- Classes & Objects
- Constructors
- `this` keyword
- **Mini Task:** Create a `Student` class

### Session 10 — OOP Pillars
- **Encapsulation** → Getters & Setters
- **Inheritance** → `extends`
- **Polymorphism** → Method overriding
- **Abstraction** → Abstract classes & Interfaces
- **Mini Task:** Animal hierarchy system

### Session 11 — Exception Handling
- `try / catch / finally`
- `throw` & `throws`
- Custom exceptions
- **Mini Task:** Safe division program

### Session 12 — Collections Framework
- `ArrayList`, `HashMap`, `HashSet`
- Iterating collections
- **Mini Task:** Student record manager

### Session 13 — File I/O
- Read & write files
- `FileReader`, `BufferedWriter`
- **Mini Task:** Save user data to a `.txt` file

### Session 14 — Final Project 🚀
- **Mini Console App** (e.g., Library System / Student Manager / ATM Simulator)
- Apply all concepts learned
- Code review & feedback

---

## 🗓️ Suggested Weekly Schedule

```
Week 1  →  Sessions 1–3   (Practical Basics)
Week 2  →  Sessions 4–6   (Logic Building)
Week 3  →  Sessions 7–8   (Data & Methods)
Week 4  →  Sessions 9–10  (OOP)
Week 5  →  Sessions 11–12 (Handling & Collections)
Week 6  →  Sessions 13–14 (I/O + Final Project)
```

---

## ✅ Assessment Checkpoints

| Checkpoint | After Session | Focus |
|---|---|---|
| Quiz 1 | Session 3 | Syntax & Basics |
| Quiz 2 | Session 6 | Logic & Control Flow |
| Quiz 3 | Session 10 | OOP Concepts |
| Final Project | Session 14 | Full Application |

---

## 📚 Resources

- 📖 *Head First Java* — Kathy Sierra
- 🌐 [docs.oracle.com/java](https://docs.oracle.com/java)
- 💻 Practice: **HackerRank Java Track**
- 🎥 Videos: **Bro Code / Telusko on YouTube**

---

> 💡 **P.P.S. Motto:**
> *"Practice it. Progress through it. Structure your thinking."*
